4.8 stars. 1,029 reviews. One tour agency on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo that keeps showing up.

Rooty Trip Phú Quốc is what happens when locals actually run the tours. No cookie-cutter boat trips. No oversized groups. Just people who know this island and show you the parts worth seeing.

If you're planning tours for your Phu Quoc trip, this one earns its rating. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
